title: The Diplomatic Relations (Vienna Convention) Act, 1972
full_text: The Diplomatic Relations (Vienna Convention) Act, 1972 राजनयिक संबंध (वियना कन्वेन्शन)अधिनियम,1972 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1972-43 Act Number: 43 Enactment Date: 1972-08-29 Act Year: 1972 Short Title: The Diplomatic Relations (Vienna Convention) Act, 1972 Hindi Title: राजनयिक संबंध (वियना कन्वेन्शन)अधिनियम,1972 Long Title: An Act to give effect to the Vienna Convention on Diplomatic Relations, 1961 and to provide for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of External Affairs Enforcement Date: 29-08-1972 Last Updated: 01-04-2019 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Diplomatic Relations (Vienna Convention) Act, 1972 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Application of Vienna Convention on Diplomatic Relations. Section 3. Application of certain privileges and immunities to diplomatic missions and their members pursuant to international agreement. Section 4. Restrictions on privileges and immunities. Section 5. Waiver. Section 6. Restrictions on certain exemptions from customs duty, etc. Section 7. Privileges and immunities of citizens of India. Section 8. Restrictions on entry into diplomatic premises. Section 9. Evidence. Section 10. Power to make rules. Section 11. Notifications issued and rules made under this Act to be laid before Parliament. Schedule 1.
